data.name: 甜蜜小屋
data.detailed_description:
甜蜜小屋》是一部仅供成人阅读的视觉小说。这个游戏是关于两个女同性恋朋友决定坐在篝火旁聊天。但事实并非如此! 一个变态者从灌木丛中跳出来，把其中一个女孩带到他的小屋......

甜蜜小屋》让你沉浸在一个安静的森林的宁静气氛中。在这个森林里，两个老的女同性恋朋友决定见面。她们聊得很开心，已经想和对方发生关系了，但事实并非如此！这时，一个男人坐在灌木丛中，他的手正拿着一本书！一个男人坐在灌木丛中撸起了他的阴茎。女孩们注意到了他，他把其中一个女孩带到了他的小屋。接下来发生了什么，你会在游戏中看到... 游戏将向玩家展示一些角色，每个角色都有自己的故事和动机。

游戏将以高质量的画面、生动活泼的人物形象取悦你。因此，不要错过机会，潜入一个妖艳和幻想的世界 甜蜜小屋》是一款游戏，你可以享受诱人的场景和色情内容，满足你最大胆和秘密的欲望。

data.supported_languages: 英文, 繁體中文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Sweet Hut
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Hut is a visual novel for adults only. This game is about two lesbian friends who decide to sit and chat around a campfire. But it wasn't to be! A pervert jumps out of the bushes and takes one of the girls to his cabin...

Sweet Hut immerses you in the tranquil atmosphere of a quiet forest. In this forest, two old lesbian friends decided to meet. They were having a nice talk and already wanted to have sex with each other, but it wasn't like that! A man was sitting in the bushes jerking his penis. Girls noticed him, and he took one of the girls to his cabin. What happened next you'll see in the game... The game will present the player with characters, each with their own story and motivation.

The game will please you with quality graphics, lively and vivid characters. So don't miss your chance to dive into a world of voluptuousness and fantasy! Sweet Hut is a game where you can enjoy seductive scenes and erotic content, satisfying your most daring and secret desires.
